title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 BeeBark is a digital platform designed to revolutionize architectural commerce and professional networking within the design and construction industry. We empower architects, builders, interior designers, and real estate developers by providing tools to showcase their work, attract high\\-quality clients, and grow their professional networks. BeeBark addresses industry challenges such as talent visibility and collaboration inefficiencies through customized digital solutions, strategic advertising, and content\\-driven engagement. As we expand, we aim to simplify hiring processes and build a trusted network for professionals and companies to discover and collaborate. Our vision is to create an integrated ecosystem merging architectural commerce, service discovery, and real estate activities.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is a part\\-time, remote Web Developer role at TheBeeBark. The Web Developer will be instrumental in designing, developing, and implementing web applications that are both visually appealing and highly functional. The role requires a proactive individual capable of handling both front\\-end and back\\-end development tasks to support the company's digital presence. Responsibilities include converting design mockups into responsive websites, supporting website maintenance, troubleshooting technical issues, and continuously enhancing the functionality of digital tools to meet user needs. The developer will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including designers and project managers, to ensure seamless integration of features that align with BeeBark’s mission of connecting architectural professionals through innovative digital solutions. This role offers flexibility and an opportunity to contribute to a dynamic startup environment while working remotely.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Candidates should possess a strong foundation in web development with experience in building custom websites both on the frontend and backend. Familiarity with drag\\-and\\-drop platforms such as Webflow, Wix, WordPress, Shopify, and Framer is essential. The ability to convert Figma designs into pixel\\-perfect websites is a key skill. Candidates must be comfortable deploying and managing hosting environments and handling revisions efficiently, demonstrating independence and minimal need for supervision.
   

  

* Build custom websites (frontend \\+ backend)
* Work with drag\\-and\\-drop platforms (Webflow, Wix, WordPress, Shopify, Framer etc.)
* Convert Figma designs into pixel\\-perfect websites
* Deploy and manage hosting environments
* Handle revisions and client iterations efficiently
* Work independently with minimal hand\\-holding


 Core technical skills required include proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and experience with React or Next.js (preferred). Knowledge of backend technologies such as Node.js or PHP is necessary, along with API integration experience and responsive design implementation. Additional skills in performance optimization, basic SEO, version control (Git), and hosting platforms (Vercel, cPanel, AWS basics) are considered advantageous.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The successful candidate will be responsible for a range of tasks that support the company’s digital initiatives. Key responsibilities include developing and maintaining websites, ensuring responsiveness across devices, and optimizing performance for speed and efficiency. The developer will collaborate with designers to translate visual concepts into functional websites and work with project managers to meet deadlines. Regularly updating existing websites, troubleshooting issues, and implementing new features to enhance user experience are integral aspects of the role. Additionally, managing hosting environments and ensuring website security and stability are critical responsibilities. The role also involves staying updated with the latest web development trends and techniques to continuously improve the company's digital assets.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At TheBeeBark, we value our team members and offer an environment conducive to growth and learning. As part of our team, you will gain exposure to a real agency setting, working on diverse projects that enhance your skills and portfolio. There is significant potential for career advancement, with opportunities to grow into a Tech Lead role as you demonstrate your capabilities. You will have the chance to work directly with the founder, gaining insights into the startup ecosystem and entrepreneurial mindset. Our performance\\-based growth model ensures that dedicated and high\\-performing individuals are rewarded accordingly. We foster a flexible work environment that encourages innovation, autonomy, and professional development.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 TheBeeBark is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team fosters creativity, innovation, and better problem\\-solving, and we are dedicated to providing equal opportunities for all applicants and employees.

title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 BeeBark is a digital platform designed to revolutionize architectural commerce and professional networking within the design and construction industry. We empower architects, builders, interior designers, and real estate developers by providing tools to showcase their work, attract high\\-quality clients, and grow their professional networks. As we expand, we aim to simplify hiring processes and build a trusted network for professionals and companies to discover and collaborate. Our vision is to create an integrated ecosystem merging architectural commerce, service discovery, and real estate activities.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is a part\\-time, remote Web Developer role at TheBeeBark. The Web Developer will be instrumental in designing, developing, and implementing web applications that are both visually appealing and highly functional. The role requires a strong focus on creating responsive websites that perform seamlessly across devices. The developer will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including designers, project managers, and marketing, to support the ongoing maintenance and enhancement of the platform. Responsibilities include building custom websites from scratch, converting Figma designs into pixel\\-perfect websites, deploying and managing hosting environments, and troubleshooting technical issues. The ideal candidate will have a proactive approach, excellent problem\\-solving skills, and the ability to work independently to meet project deadlines and quality standards.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Proven experience in building custom websites with both frontend and backend development

* Ability to convert Figma designs into responsive, pixel\\-perfect websites

* Efficient handling of revisions and client iterations
* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision


**Core Skills Required**
* Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
* Experience with React or Next.js (preferred)
* Knowledge of Node.js or PHP (at least one backend language)
* API integration experience
* Strong understanding of responsive design principles


**Additional Skills (Bonus)**
* Performance optimization techniques
* Basic understanding of SEO best practices
* Experience with Git or other version control systems
* Familiarity with hosting platforms such as Vercel, cPanel, or AWS basics


**Responsibilities**
* Design and develop custom websites, ensuring they are visually appealing, user\\-friendly, and fully functional across all devices
* Convert static Figma designs into fully responsive websites
* Support ongoing website maintenance, updates, and troubleshooting
* Implement API integrations to connect third\\-party tools and services
* Deploy websites to hosting environments and manage deployment workflows
* Collaborate with designers and project managers to understand project requirements and deliver solutions accordingly
* Optimize website performance for speed and efficiency
* Ensure websites are SEO\\-friendly and adhere to best practices
* Manage multiple projects simultaneously, prioritizing tasks effectively
* Document development processes and provide technical support as needed


**Benefits**
 Joining TheBeeBark offers a unique opportunity to gain exposure to the dynamic startup environment and work directly with the founder. You will have the chance to grow your skills in a fast\\-paced setting, with potential pathways into leadership roles such as Tech Lead. The role provides real agency experience, allowing you to work on diverse projects and contribute to innovative solutions in the architectural and construction industry. Additionally, you will be part of a forward\\-thinking team that values performance, initiative, and professional growth. We offer flexible work arrangements, a collaborative work culture, and opportunities for career advancement based on your performance and commitment.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 At TheBeeBark, we are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse work environment. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse perspectives and backgrounds strengthen our team and drive innovation. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates who are passionate about contributing to our mission and growth. Equal opportunity employment is a fundamental value, and we strive to create a workplace where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered to succeed.

title: Software Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Nemetschek Group is a leading global provider of software solutions tailored for the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AEC/O) industry. With a legacy spanning over fifty years, the company has established itself as a pioneer in digital transformation within the industry. Listed on the MDAX and TecDAX stock exchanges in Germany, Nemetschek Group is committed to delivering innovative, intelligent software that enables customers to plan, build, manage, and operate infrastructure and building projects efficiently. Our solutions encompass the entire project lifecycle, fostering seamless collaboration and digitalization across various disciplines. As part of our mission, we aim to empower professionals with cutting\\-edge tools that facilitate sustainable development, productivity, and precision in their work.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are currently seeking a dedicated Junior Software Developer \\- UI to join our team at Nemetschek India, Bangalore. This role offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development of user interfaces for Allplan’s desktop applications, primarily utilizing C\\#/WPF. The successful candidate will play a vital role in translating design concepts into functional, visually appealing UI components that enhance user experience. Collaborating closely with designers, senior developers, QA teams, and product managers, the Junior UI Developer will help shape intuitive interfaces that meet high standards of usability and performance. This position is ideal for individuals eager to grow their skills in UI development within a dynamic, innovative environment, and to make a tangible impact on our software solutions.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess some professional experience or internships related to UI or software development, with a focus on C\\#/WPF. A foundational understanding of user interface design principles and modern application best practices is essential. The candidate should demonstrate enthusiasm for learning, asking questions, and contributing collaboratively within a team. Attention to detail, especially regarding usability and visual consistency, is crucial. Strong communication and problem\\-solving skills are required, along with a desire for continuous growth in UI development. Proficiency in English is mandatory, and additional language skills will be considered an advantage.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The Junior Software Developer \\- UI will be responsible for implementing and maintaining UI components in C\\#/WPF, adhering to established design and UX guidelines. The role involves translating prototypes and wireframes into fully functional desktop application interfaces that are both attractive and user\\-friendly. The developer will participate in code reviews to ensure adherence to UI standards and best practices, as well as debug and troubleshoot UI\\-related issues to improve usability and performance. Collaboration is key; the candidate will work closely with designers, senior developers, QA teams, and product management to clarify requirements, refine solutions, and ensure the delivery of high\\-quality interfaces. Additionally, the role encourages continuous skill development and contribution to process improvements, fostering a culture of innovation and excellence.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work in a young, dynamic, and innovation\\-driven environment.
* Engagement with a diverse range of projects across various industries, providing broad exposure and learning opportunities.
* An open and informal corporate culture that emphasizes knowledge sharing, employee development, and collaborative growth.
* Support for personal initiative, professional development, and career advancement.
* Realistic and transparent career progression pathways within the organization.
* Competitive compensation packages complemented by fringe benefits designed to support work\\-life balance and well\\-being.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Nemetschek Group is committed to creating an inclusive and diverse workplace. We provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants without regard to race, religion, gender, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. We believe that a diverse workforce fosters innovation, creativity, and a positive working environment, and we are dedicated to ensuring that every individual has the opportunity to succeed and grow within our organization.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company renowned for its innovative approach to artificial intelligence and software development. With a focus on accelerating AI research and deployment, Turing collaborates with some of the world's most prominent AI companies and organizations. The company prides itself on fostering a dynamic, inclusive, and forward\\-thinking environment that empowers talented professionals to push the boundaries of technological advancements. Turing's commitment to excellence and innovation positions it as a pioneer in the AI industry, continuously striving to develop solutions that have a meaningful impact on various sectors worldwide.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our groundbreaking project focused on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role requires a deep understanding of high\\-quality public repositories on GitHub and the ability to contribute actively to the development of verifiable software engineering tasks based on real\\-world data. As a key member of the team, you will be responsible for hands\\-on software engineering tasks, including automating development environments, triaging issues, and assessing test coverage and quality. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work at the intersection of software engineering and AI research, directly influencing how LLMs interact with and understand complex codebases.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby. Strong familiarity with version control systems like Git, containerization tools like Docker, and basic software pipeline setup is essential. Candidates should demonstrate the ability to navigate and understand complex codebases, modify and run projects locally, and evaluate code quality effectively. Experience contributing to open\\-source projects or participating in open\\-source evaluations is highly desirable. Additionally, excellent problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote environment are critical for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues reported in GitHub repositories, focusing on trending open\\-source libraries.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and dependency management.
* Evaluate unit test coverage and assess the quality of codebases to ensure robustness.
* Modify and execute code locally to test LLM performance, particularly in bug\\-fixing scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with researchers to identify repositories and issues that challenge LLMs, contributing to dataset expansion and refinement.
* Potentially lead a team of junior engineers, providing guidance and mentorship on project tasks and best practices.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers numerous advantages, including the flexibility of a fully remote work environment, allowing you to work from anywhere in the world. You will have the opportunity to engage with cutting\\-edge AI projects and collaborate with industry\\-leading experts in the field. This role provides a platform to enhance your skills in software engineering and AI research, contributing to impactful projects that shape the future of AI\\-assisted software development. Additionally, Turing promotes a culture of continuous learning and innovation, supporting your professional growth and development in a dynamic setting.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse work environment. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, or disability. We believe that diverse perspectives drive innovation and excellence, and we are dedicated to ensuring that all employees and applicants are treated with fairness and respect throughout the hiring process and beyond.

title: MERN Stack Developer Intern
description:
MERN Stack Developer Intern
 



 Inficore Soft
 



  





 Location: Remote

 Duration: 1–3 Months
 



  





 Inficore Soft is looking for a MERN Stack Developer Intern who is interested in building modern, scalable web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js. This role offers hands\\-on experience in full stack development and working on real\\-world projects from concept to deployment.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 • Develop and maintain full stack applications using the MERN stack
 



 • Build interactive and responsive user interfaces using React.js
 



 • Develop backend APIs using Node.js and Express.js
 



 • Design and manage databases using MongoDB
 



 • Integrate frontend and backend components seamlessly
 



 • Debug, test, and improve application performance
 



 • Collaborate with team members to implement features and enhancements
 



 • Maintain clean, modular, and well\\-documented code
 



  





 Required Skills
 



 • Basic knowledge of JavaScript and web development fundamentals
 



 • Familiarity with React.js for frontend development
 



 • Basic understanding of Node.js and Express.js
 



 • Knowledge of MongoDB or NoSQL databases
 



 • Understanding of REST APIs and JSON
 



 • Familiarity with Git/GitHub is preferred
 



 • Strong problem\\-solving and logical thinking skills
 



 • Ability to work independently in a remote environment
 



  





 Eligibility Criteria
 



 • Students or recent graduates from Computer Science, IT, or related fields
 



 • Freshers with basic MERN stack knowledge are encouraged to apply
 



 • Candidates with personal or academic MERN projects will have an advantage
 



 • Must be available for a full\\-time remote internship
 



  





 Perks and Benefits
 



 • Stipend of ₹18,000 per month
 



 • Hands\\-on experience with real\\-world MERN stack projects
 



 • Internship completion certificate

 • Exposure to modern tools and technologies
 



 • Learning\\-focused and growth\\-oriented environment
 



  





 This internship is ideal for individuals who want to start their career in full stack development and gain practical experience using the MERN stack.

title: Node Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Deloitte is a globally recognized leader in professional services, renowned for delivering innovative solutions across a wide spectrum of industries. With a rich history of excellence, Deloitte provides consulting, audit, tax, and advisory services to organizations of all sizes, from startups to Fortune 500 companies. The firm is committed to fostering a culture of inclusion, integrity, and high performance, aiming to create a positive impact on clients, employees, and communities worldwide. Deloitte’s dedication to continuous innovation and excellence has established it as a trusted partner for organizations seeking to navigate complex business challenges and capitalize on emerging opportunities.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Node.js Developer at Deloitte, you will play a vital role within our Technology \\& Transformation practice, contributing to the development of cutting\\-edge software solutions that enable our clients to harness the power of data. Your primary responsibilities will include designing, developing, testing, and maintaining scalable and high\\-performance Node.js applications. You will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions, ensuring the delivery of reliable and efficient software products. This role offers an excellent opportunity to work on innovative projects utilizing the latest technologies such as microservices, containerization, and cloud computing, all within a supportive and dynamic environment that encourages professional growth and technical excellence.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s or higher degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
* Minimum of 3 years of professional experience as a Node.js Developer.
* Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript programming languages.
* Hands\\-on experience with Node.js frameworks, with Nest.js being mandatory.
* Strong understanding of unit testing frameworks such as Mocha, Jest, Jasmine, Chai, or Sinon.
* Knowledge of containerization tools like Docker and orchestration platforms such as Kubernetes is a plus.
* Familiarity with software development best practices, including design patterns, SOLID principles, and clean code.
* Experience with microservices architecture, event\\-driven systems, and serverless computing is advantageous.
* Understanding of DevOps tools and practices.
* Ability to write clean, maintainable code and utilize static code review tools.
* Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases.
* Strong problem\\-solving, debugging, and communication skills.
* Ability to collaborate effectively within a team\\-oriented environment.


**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable Node.js applications aligned with client requirements and industry best practices.
* Implement RESTful APIs and integrate third\\-party services to enhance application functionality.
* Write comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and reliability.
* Participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback to team members and adhering to coding standards.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams including product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver high\\-quality solutions.
* Utilize containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes for deployment and scaling.
* Contribute to architecture discussions and technical decision\\-making processes.
* Maintain documentation of code, processes, and technical specifications.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends to continuously improve skills and project outcomes.


**Benefits**
 Deloitte values its employees and offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support their well\\-being and professional growth. Employees enjoy competitive salary packages, health insurance, retirement plans, and paid time off. The organization emphasizes work\\-life balance through flexible working arrangements and wellness programs. Deloitte also invests in continuous learning through training sessions, workshops, and access to Deloitte University, enabling employees to enhance their skills and advance their careers. title: LEAD ENGINEER
description:
At OakNorth, we’re on a mission to empower the UK’s most ambitious businesses. Since 2015, we’ve lent over $21 billion across the UK and US, helped create more than 58,000 new homes and 36,000 new jobs, and supported hundreds of thousands of personal savers — all while fuelling the UK economy.
   

  

 OakNorth is a profitable business that has supported the growth of thousands of entrepreneurs with a new standard of business lending. We're looking for people to join our Engineering team in building upon this success, as we grow to play a key part in redefining the future of business banking with next generation financial tools and products.
   

  

 This is a fantastic opportunity to join a fast\\-paced, growing bank with a reputation for doing things differently. We don’t want another cog in the machine, we’re looking for self\\-starters and bold thinkers who want to pave their own career paths.
   

  

**The role 👋**
* Have a strong technical background, including 9\\+ years of experience designing and engineering large scale systems
* Strong experience in either backend (Python) or frontend (React) in enterprise\\-class applications, with a pragmatic attitude to tech and a willingness to grow into full stack over time
* Architecture and system design knowledge (prefer in Domain\\-driven Design, Event design)
* Measure your success in terms of business impact, not lines of code
* Internalise the best ideas from across the organisation, humbly setting a vision that others can get behind
* Embrace DevOps culture: You build it, you run it
* Work well cross\\-functionally and earn trust from co\\-workers at all levels
* Care deeply about mentorship and growing your colleagues
* Prefer simple solutions and designs over complex ones
* Enjoy working with a diverse group of people with different areas of expertise.
* You challenge the existing approach when you see the cliff edge racing towards us, but also get on board once the options have been debated and the team has made a decision
* You're comfortably organised amongst chaos
* You’re a broad thinker and have the capability to see the potential impact of decisions across the wider business
* Own the technical direction and act as the go\\-to architect for your area for a domain or product area, and bring engineers, PMs, and stakeholders along with you
* Raise the engineering bar:
* Champion design quality, reliability, observability and security
* Challenge over\\-complicated designs and push for pragmatic, evolvable solutions
* Coach and mentor Senior and mid\\-level engineers, giving clear feedback and helping them grow into broader responsibilities
* Partner closely with Product and Delivery to:
* Shape roadmaps, Highlight risks early
* Make sensible trade\\-offs between scope, risk, and timelines
* Take ownership during incidents and tricky production problems, coordinating technical response and follow\\-ups, not just writing the fix


**Technology 🧱**
* We're pragmatic about our technology choices. These are some of the things we use at the moment:
* 🗃 Python
* 🗄️ PostgreSQL, BigQuery, MySQL
* 🎨 TypeScript, React, styled\\-components
* 🔧 Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress, pytest
* ☁️ AWS, GCP
* 🚀 ECS Fargate, Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions


**How We Expect You To Work 👷‍♀️**
* We expect you to work in these ways, as well as encouraging and enabling these practices from others:
* Collaborate 💬 \\- We work in cross\\-functional, mission driven, autonomous squads that gel over time. We pair program to work better through shared experience and knowledge.
* Focus on outcomes over outputs ✅ \\- Solving a problem for users that translates to business results is our goal. Measurements focused on that goal help us to understand if we are succeeding.
* Practice continuous improvement 💡 \\- We optimise for feedback now, rather than presume what might be needed in the future and introduce complexity before it will be used. This means we learn faster. We share learnings in blame\\-free formats, so that we do not repeat things that have failed, but still have confidence to innovate.
* Seek to understand our users 👂 \\- We constantly seek understanding from data and conversations to better serve our users' needs, taking an active part in research to hear from them directly and regularly.
* Embrace and enable continuous deployment 🤖 \\- Seamless delivery of changes into an environment \\- without manual intervention \\- is essential for us to ensure that we are highly productive; consider resiliency; and practice security by design.
* Test outside\\-in, test first 🚦 \\- TDD keeps us confident in moving fast, and deploying regularly. We want to solve user problems, and so we test with that mindset \\- writing scenarios first, then considering our solution; coupling tests to behaviour, rather than implementation.
* You build it, you run it ⚙️ \\- We embrace DevOps culture and end\\-to\\-end ownership of products and features. Every engineer, regardless of their role, has the opportunity to lead delivery of features from start to finish.
* Be cloud native ☁️ \\- We leverage automation and hosted services to deliver resilient, secure services quickly and consistently. Where SaaS tools help us achieve more productivity and better\\-quality results for a cheap price, we use these to automate low value tasks.


**How We Expect You To Behave ❤️**
* We embrace differences and know that when we can be ourselves at work, we are happier, more motivated, and creative. We want to be able to bring our whole selves to work, have our own perspectives and know that we belong. As such, through your behaviours at work, we expect you to reflect and actively sustain a healthy engineering environment that looks like this:
* A wide range of voices heard to the benefit of all
* Teams that are clearly happy, engaged, and laugh together
* Perceivable safety to have an opinion or ask a question
* No egos \\- people listen to and learn from others at all levels, with strong opinions held loosely


**Benefits \\& Perks 😍**
* Equity. We want people to have a stake in the business so that all our interests are aligned.
* Health Insurance for employee and dependents.
* Wellbeing and social events
* Support causes that matter to you – Volunteering time off


**About Us**
 We’re OakNorth Bank and we embolden entrepreneurs to realise their ambitions, understand their markets, and apply data intelligence to everyday decisions to scale successfully at pace.
   

  

 Banking should be barrier\\-free. It’s a belief at our very core, inspired by our entrepreneurial spirit, driven by the unmet financial needs of millions, and delivered by our data\\-driven tools.
   

  

 And for those who love helping businesses thrive? Our savings accounts help diversify the high street and create new jobs, all while earning savers some of the highest interest on the market.
   

  

 But we go beyond finance, to empower our people, encourage professional growth and create an environment where everyone can thrive. We strive to create an inclusive and diverse workplace where people can be themselves and succeed.
   

  

***Our story***
 OakNorth Bank was built on the foundations of frustrations with old\\-school banking. In 2005, when our founders tried to get capital for their data analytics company, the computer said ‘no’. Unfortunately, all major banks in the UK were using the same computer – and it was broken.
   

  

 Why was it so difficult for a profitable business with impressive cashflow, retained clients, and clear commercial success to get a loan?
   

  

 The industry was backward\\-looking and too focused on historic financials, rather than future potential.
   

  

 So, what if there was a bank, founded by entrepreneurs, for entrepreneurs? One that offered a dramatically better borrowing experience for businesses?
   

  

 No more what ifs, OakNorth Bank exists.
   

  

 For more information regarding our Privacy Policy and practices, please visit: https://oaknorth.co.uk/legal/privacy\\-notice/employees\\-and\\-visitors/
